pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+; using Spring Boot 2.7 with Java 21 may cause compatibility issues or prevent access to new features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would still compile/run against Java 8 bytecode or features, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially conflicting with dependencies requiring Java 17+ (like Spring Boot 3).

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade springdoc-openapi version to 2.6.0 to match Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: springdoc-openapi 1.x is not compatible with Spring Boot 3.x (which uses Spring Framework 6); using the old version would result in runtime errors or missing API support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace springdoc-openapi-ui artifact with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to align with Spring Boot 3.x module structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'springdoc-openapi-ui' was removed/renamed in springdoc-openapi 2.x; using the old artifact ID will result in a dependency resolution failure (artifact not found).
